name: 道の駅 筑前みなみの里
desc: 地元野菜が夕方には売り切れるほど人気の直売所を持つ道の駅。農村レストラン「筑膳」では、かまど炊きごはんと筑前煮がお代わり自由で味わえる。
descEn: Its produce market is so popular that local vegetables often sell out by evening. At the farm restaurant Chikuzen, rice cooked in a traditional kamado stove and simmered vegetables are served with free refills.
